sglang.title: feat: support flashinfer kernel autotune
sglang.author: elvischenv
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Flashinfer MoE requires autotune to select a most performant kernel. This should be done before cudagraph captures.
Modifications
This PR added a kernel warmup stage before the cudagraph captures. In the warmup stage, it will run a dummy forward for the model under the Flashinfer autotune

sglang.title: add runtime check for PyTorch 2.9.1 + CuDNN < 9.15 to prevent Conv3d performance issues
sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Summary
This PR addresses a known compatibility issue between PyTorch 2.9.1 and CuDNN versions older than 9.15, which causes severe performance degradation and excessive memory usage in nn.Conv3d operations.
Motivation
As documented in pytorch/pytorch#168167, pytorch/pytorch#166790, pytor

vllm.title: [Kernel][Quantization] add w4a8 support for marlin kernel
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Introduction
This PR adds W4A8 support for marlin and moe marlin kernels:


Supported weight types: INT4 without ZP (GPTQ), INT4 with ZP (AWQ), MXFP4 (Note: NVFP4 format is not yet supported because it uses a groupsize of 16, which is smaller than the currently supported minimum groupsize of 32).

vllm.title: [Bugfix][sleepmode][fp8 kv cache]: Fix FP8 KV cache + sleep(level=2) gibberish output
vllm.author: Flink-ddd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes #25800 where waking from sleep(level=2) with kv_cache_dtype="fp8" results in gibberish output.
Bug Cause
When the engine enters level 2 sleep (llm.sleep(level=2)), all VRAM is discarded, including the FP8 scaling factors for the KV cache tensors.
The existing wake_up(tags=["kv_cache"])

vllm.title: [Misc] Update `TokenizerLike` interface and move `get_cached_tokenizer`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Add pad_token_id to TokenizerLike interface to be used in Score API.
Use HF defaults for __call__, encode, decode and convert_ids_to_tokens; apply them to MistralTokenizer as well. cc @patrickvonplaten
Pass more arguments to from_pretrained to be in line with TokenizerRegistry.get_tokenizer
